title: Gluta aptera

It belongs to the order Sapindales and the class Magnoliopsida, also known as flowering plants. Gluta aptera is a species of tree native to Southeast Asia. It is also known as the Peninsular flame tree or the Penang lallang.
uses: Gluta aptera, also known as the Sapodilla tree, has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits.
